subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-20
subcodes.first_line: I did not have any dinner whatsoever last night, nor did I sleep at all.  I was engaged in writing until morning approached
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب من ابداً شام میل نکردم و شب هیچ نخوابیدم تا نزدیک صبح چیز می‌نوشتم
